detail: Confirm stage statuses, blockers, dependencies, signoff, and no-go triggers
Confirm First Nations authority, quorum, delegation, and escalation
Approve data classes, access, retention, deletion, reporting, and benefit
Approve notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, retention, and incident route
Run access, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, log, and revoke checks
Confirm pause, support, escalation, breach assessment, and cultural safety pathway
Keep membership, chartering, signatures, payments, and member numbers external
Check screenshots, CSV, JSON, docs, and public wording
Set response clocks for support, withdrawal, correction, and access needs
Use fake/sample package until contract, authority, privacy, and access pass
Set review date, delete/retain/archive owner, and evidence rule
